recommendations.title: American Me
recommendations.overview: During his 18 years in Folsom Prison, street-gang leader Santana rules over all the drug-and-murder activities behind bars. Upon his release, Santana goes back to his old neighborhood, intending to lead a peaceful, crime-free life. But his old gang b

recommendations.title: A Dog's Way Home
recommendations.overview: The adventure of Bella, a dog who embarks on an epic 400-mile journey home after she is separated from her beloved human.

recommendations.title: Stand and Deliver
recommendations.overview: Jaime Escalante is a mathematics teacher in a school in a hispanic neighbourhood. Convinced that his students have potential, he adopts unconventional teaching methods to try and turn gang members and no-hopers into some of the country's top algebra

recommendations.title: Even Cowgirls Get the Blues
recommendations.overview: A girl born with enormous thumbs in the repressive era of the 1950s learns to turn her quirks into assets.

recommendations.title: The Road to El Dorado
recommendations.overview: Stowing away after a failed con, a pair of swindlers end up on El Dorado, the fabled "city of gold", where they quickly get in over their heads when they are mistaken as gods by the inhabitants.

recommendations.title: Ravenous
recommendations.overview: In an isolated rural community of Quebec, Canada, some inhabitants attack other people, hungry for human flesh. A few survivors gather and go deep into the forest to escape them.

recommendations.title: 2 Guns
recommendations.overview: A DEA agent and an undercover Naval Intelligence officer who have been tasked with investigating one another find they have been set up by the mob -- the very organization the two men believe they have been stealing money from.

recommendations.title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: The End of Evangelion
recommendations.overview: SEELE orders an all-out attack on NERV, aiming to destroy the Evas before Gendo can advance his own plans for the Human Instrumentality Project. Shinji is pushed to the limits of his sanity as he is forced to decide the fate of humanity.

recommendations.title: Paan Singh Tomar
recommendations.overview: Paan Singh Tomar goes from celebrated runner to star brigand and rebel when life after sports fails to unfold as planned.

recommendations.title: All Hail
recommendations.overview: A famous TV weatherman, Miguel Flores, becomes public enemy number one when he fails to predict a terrible hailstorm. He is forced out of the big city, Buenos Aires, fleeing the capital for his birthplace of Córdoba. The result will be a voyage of re
